intro: 🔁 Two swaps — Nestlé and LVMH aren't on Pluto (European exchanges). Please tap ❌ Reject on those two in the basket above, and here are two US-listed quality replacements that fill the same slots. Approve, buy, and reply with your fill as usual.

proposals.thesis: Global snacks-and-beverages powerhouse (Frito-Lay, Gatorade, Pepsi) with durable brands and pricing power, derated to ~22x earnings with a ~4% yield after a soft patch. A 54-year dividend grower — defensive ballast that diversifies away from the tech names. (Replaces Nestlé.)
proposals.valuation_note: P/E ~22 with ~4% yield, below its historical multiple
proposals.what_would_make_this_wrong: Volumes keep declining as health/GLP-1 trends durably curb snacking and soda
proposals.tax_note: Buy — no realization. US stock: buy for ~2,375 DKK (fractional ≈ 2.6 shares).

proposals.thesis: The world's dominant quick-service restaurant — a high-margin franchise/royalty model with global scale and pricing power — trading ~22x earnings, about 14% below its 10-year median, after a pullback. Defensive consumer exposure to balance the basket. (Replaces LVMH.)
proposals.what_would_make_this_wrong: Sustained traffic declines from value-conscious consumers or franchise-system strain
proposals.tax_note: Buy — no realization. US stock: buy for ~2,375 DKK (fractional ≈ 1.3 shares).
